costs.caveat: Current qfa backtest CLI has no cost/slippage parameter; qfa metrics are pre-cost. A 5 bps turnover haircut would be research-estimate only, not an applied qfa result.

research_annotations.data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa backtest; no --data-csv and no CSV fixtures
research_annotations.decision_rationale: Full-period Sharpe is positive but modest; median random-window Sharpe is positive and lower-tail windows are not catastrophic. Keep on watchlist pending cost-aware and parameter-stability validation.
research_annotations.divergent_child_idea: AR-010-D1: Mega-cap defensive earnings-quality drift using post-earnings gap persistence plus balance-sheet/profitability proxies rather than realized-volatility ranks.

random_window_protocol.source: Alpaca real market data via quant_for_agent.AlpacaGateway, no CSV fixtures

research_annotations.refinement_child_idea: AR-010-R1: Parameter-stability/cost-aware low-vol quality proxy sweep vol_window=[60,126,189], top_n=[4,6,8], momentum_filter=[true,false], with explicit turnover-cost haircut and monthly rebalance approximation.
